categories.name: Web Browsers
categories.description: Essential web browsers for modern internet navigation.

apps.name: Google Chrome
apps.description: Chrome is the official web browser from Google, built to be fast, secure, and customizable.

reviews.author: TechReviewer99
reviews.text: Essential application. I install Google Chrome on every new machine.

reviews.author: SysAdmin_Dave
reviews.text: Solid performance, frequent updates. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: CasualUser
reviews.text: Super easy to use and it just works.

cons: Can be resource intensive on older hardware
Steep learning curve for advanced features

apps.name: Mozilla Firefox (en-US)
apps.description: Firefox Browser, also known as Mozilla Firefox or simply Firefox, is a free and open-source web browser developed by the Mozilla Foundation and its subsidiary, the Mozilla Corporation. Firefox uses the Gecko layout engine to render web pages, which implements current and anticipated web standards. In 2017, Firefox began incorporating new technology under the code name Quantum to promote parallelism and a more intuitive user interface. Firefox is officially available for Windows 7 or newer, macOS, and Linux. Its unofficial ports are available for various Unix and Unix-like operating systems including FreeBSD, OpenBSD, NetBSD, illumos, and Solaris Unix.

reviews.author: TechReviewer99
reviews.text: Essential application. I install Mozilla Firefox (en-US) on every new machine.

reviews.author: SysAdmin_Dave
reviews.text: Solid performance, frequent updates. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: CasualUser
reviews.text: Super easy to use and it just works.

cons: Can be resource intensive on older hardware
Steep learning curve for advanced features
